executives.name: Jason O'Connell
executives.background: Mr. O'Connell is the Senior Vice President, Energy. He joined Franco-Nevada in 2007 and has been involved in the management of the Company's energy portfolio.

executives.name: Tim Warman
executives.background: Mr. Warman is a geologist with over 30 years of experience. He was previously CEO of Fiore Gold Ltd. and held senior roles with Dalradian Resources Inc. and Aurelian Resources Inc.
